patch.value: Complete the SDK extension-invoke testing surface: runRegisteredHookForTest + override invoke helpers

Finish the package-author 'invoke' verb. runRegisteredCommandForTest (pm-owm0) lets authors fire a registered command handler and assert behavior, but the OTHER runtime surfaces an extension can register still have only assert* helpers (registration), no supported way to INVOKE them and observe behavior. Authors must hand-build contexts and reach for the internal runtime runners. This completes the command-pipeline invoke surface: (1) runRegisteredHookForTest(hooks, {kind, context}) fires a registered lifecycle hook (before_command|after_command|on_read|on_write|on_index) via the real runtime runner and returns the warnings array ([] = clean); type-safe per-kind context via discriminated union; throws a descriptive error listing kinds-with-registrations when none of that kind exist (a test wiring/typo bug). (2) runRegisteredParserOverrideForTest / runRegisteredPreflightOverrideForTest / runRegisteredCommandOverrideForTest / runRegisteredRendererOverrideForTest / runRegisteredServiceOverrideForTest each wrap the matching runtime runner (runParserOverride/runPreflightOverride/runCommandOverride/runRendererOverride/runServiceOverride), guard that a matching override is registered for the target (command/format/service) so a typo surfaces as a clear error rather than a silent overridden:false, and return the real *OverrideResult verbatim. All helpers async for a uniform await-based API. Export from the public SDK testing barrel, cover to 100%, and document in SDK.md + EXTENSIONS.md. Data-plane invoke (search provider query, vector adapter ops, migration run) is intentionally out of scope here and tracked separately.

value.note: Re-export new invoke helpers + option types from SDK barrel
Note invoke helpers in extension testing guidance
Document hook + override invoke helpers in testing section

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: Implemented in src/sdk/testing.ts (+ barrel src/sdk/index.ts). Added 6 invoke helpers completing the command-pipeline "invoke" verb symmetric to runRegisteredCommandForTest (pm-owm0): runRegisteredHookForTest (5 lifecycle kinds via a type-safe discriminated-union RunRegisteredHookForTestOptions; returns runner warnings, [] = clean; throws listing populated kinds when none of the requested kind exist) + runRegistered{Parser,Preflight,Command,Renderer,Service}OverrideForTest (each guards a matching override is registered for the target command/format/service — preflight guards non-empty since the runtime applies the last override regardless of command — then delegates to the real runtime runner and returns the *OverrideResult verbatim). All async for a uniform await API. Reused existing HOOK_KIND_TO_REGISTRY_FIELD map + normalizeSdkCommandName/sortedUnique/formatAvailable helpers (no new private helpers). Runtime runners + context/result types imported from core/extensions/loader.js (re-exported there via export * from extension-types.js). 100% coverage of testing.ts (348/348 stmts, 268/268 branch, 119/119 func). Manual E2E in temp dir against built dist: all 9 checks (clean hook, warning hook, hook guard, 5 override invokes, override guard) passed. Docs: SDK.md export list + invoke-verb paragraph + Testing Helpers examples; EXTENSIONS.md one-line note (kept under 450-line cap).

value.author: claude-code-agent

patch.value: Shipped in PR #329 (squash 28b61e92). Added 6 SDK testing invoke helpers completing the command-pipeline invoke verb: runRegisteredHookForTest (5 lifecycle kinds) + runRegistered{Parser,Preflight,Command,Renderer,Service}OverrideForTest. 100% coverage, full suite green (4816 tests). CodeRabbit clean; Gemini's 2 normalization findings declined as false positives (would break guard/runtime parity). Manual E2E against built dist passed.

Shipped in PR #329 (squash 28b61e92): 6 SDK testing invoke helpers (runRegisteredHookForTest + 5 override-invoke helpers) completing the command-pipeline invoke verb, exported from the SDK barrel and documented.

Package authors can invoke every registered runtime surface (lifecycle hooks + parser/preflight/command/renderer/service overrides) in tests and assert behavior, symmetric to runRegisteredCommandForTest.

All 6 helpers added with type-safe contexts and registration guards; 100% coverage of testing.ts; full suite green (4816 tests); manual E2E against built dist passed; CodeRabbit clean; Gemini findings declined as false positives.
